title: Jodhpur、Rajasthan — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Jodhpur、Rajasthan的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Jodhpur是Rajasthan的一個城市，人口約1,200,000。The Blue City of Rajasthan, dominated by the imposing Mehrangarh Fort, known for its blue-painted houses and royal heritage.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
